name: Wu Shuo (Zilan)
page_title: Wu Shuo (Zilan) 吳碩 (子蘭) [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Wu Shuo was styled Zilan. He served as a Gentleman Consultant in Xu. In 199, he joined the plot headed by Dong Cheng designed to kill off Cao Cao. However, Cao Cao discovered the plot in the early months of 200 and Wu Shuo was executed shortly after.[SGZ32]

sections.short-biography: Part of Dong Cheng’s plot to kill Cao Cao but discovered and executed.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	吳碩 (子蘭)


	 Simplified Chinese 
	吴硕 (子兰)


	 Pronunciation 
	Wu2 Shuo4 (Zi3lan2)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Wú Shuò (Zǐlán)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Wu Shuo (Tzŭlan)

	 Birthplace 
	Unknown

	 Other Names 
	Wu Zilan, Wu Shi

	 Name Notes 
	Sanguozhi: Shu 2 describes a man by the name of Wu Zilan 吳子蘭, naming him among the conspirators. It is reasonable to conclude that this is Wu Shuo (as he is named in Hou Han shu) and that Zilan was his style.

In the Brewitt-Taylor novel transition, Wu Shuo appears as Wu Shi.

full_text:
Wu Shuo (Zilan) 吳碩 (子蘭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Shuo (吳碩), styledZilan (子蘭). Part of Dong Cheng’s plot to kill Cao Cao but discovered and executed. Wu Shuo was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wu Shuo lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Wu Shuo was styled Zilan. He served as a Gentleman Consultant in Xu. In 199, he joined the plot headed by Dong Cheng designed to kill off Cao Cao. However, Cao Cao discovered the plot in the early months of 200 and Wu Shuo was executed shortly after.[SGZ32]
